race.comment: The usual final race frustration where almost half the field are emergencies. SHE'S BRUTAL (12) tackled a mile last time and finished fifth in a richer race. Will relish the early pressure here and drawn for a soft run. Gets a chance to find some winning form. TAKUNAI (4) is long overdue but rarely far away. Fifth here behind PEACH GALANTES last time and could well turn the tables. JACKS AND SODA (2) has been thereabouts in two runs back from a break and looks ready to peak. Placed 2/3 at this course and distance and will give a sight. PEACH GALANTES (15) scored an overdue win racing on speed and kicking strongly. Has the claim and a low draw. Entered and scratched from another race on the card but has gained a start here and will give a sight again.
